     The shape of the use case helps decide the API. -->

## Have you checked

- [ ] The existing `InteractionPolicy` / `CellRendererRegistry` /
      widget-cells path doesn't already cover this.
- [ ] The package's design rules (no `Uint64List` on web, no widget per
      body cell on the paint path, zero per-cell cost when off) don't
      block your idea.
